variants.name: 侍僧
variants.ability: 你不知道你是侍僧。你以为你是一个镇民角色，但其实你不是。说书人可能会更改你提交的咒语。
variants.firstNightReminder: Wake Acolyte exactly as if they were said townsfolk. You can alter their submitted Spell as you see fit.
variants.otherNightReminder: Wake the Acolyte exactly as if they were their assigned townsfolk. You can alter their submitted Spell as you see fit.
